ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's stadium */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the team was established */,
  "home_colors" TEXT /* Home colors of the team */,
  "away_colors" TEXT /* Away colors of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the match (e.g., E0 for Premier League) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score for the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score for the away team */,
  "full_time_result" TEXT /* Full-time result (H, A, D for Home, Away, Draw) */,
  "half_time_score_home" INTEGER /* Half-time score for the home team */,
  "half_time_score_away" INTEGER /* Half-time score for the away team */,
  "half_time_result" TEXT /* Half-time result (H, A, D for Home, Away, Draw) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the match */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots by the away team */,
  "home_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "away_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls by the home team */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls by the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners by the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners by the away team */,
  "home_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the home team */,
  "away_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the away team */,
  "home_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the home team */,
  "away_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the away team */,
  "home_passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes by the home team */,
  "away_passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes by the away team */,
  "home_pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy of the home team */,
  "away_pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the bookmaker */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the bookmaker was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "home_win" REAL /* Odds for a home team win */,
  "draw" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "away_win" REAL /* Odds for an away team win */,
  "over_2_5" REAL /* Odds for over 2.5 goals */,
  "under_2_5" REAL /* Odds for under 2.5 goals */,
  "btts" REAL /* Odds for both teams to score */,
  "no_btts" REAL /* Odds for either team to not score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_summary" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "total_bets" INTEGER /* Total number of bets placed */,
  "max_home_win" REAL /* Maximum odds for a home team win */,
  "avg_home_win" REAL /* Average odds for a home team win */,
  "max_draw" REAL /* Maximum odds for a draw */,
  "avg_draw" REAL /* Average odds for a draw */,
  "max_away_win" REAL /* Maximum odds for an away team win */,
  "avg_away_win" REAL /* Average odds for an away team win */,
  "max_over_2_5" REAL /* Maximum odds for over 2.5 goals */,
  "avg_over_2_5" REAL /* Average odds for over 2.5 goals */,
  "max_under_2_5" REAL /* Maximum odds for under 2.5 goals */,
  "avg_under_2_5" REAL /* Average odds for under 2.5 goals */,
  "max_btts" REAL /* Maximum odds for both teams to score */,
  "avg_btts" REAL /* Average odds for both teams to score */,
  "max_no_btts" REAL /* Maximum odds for either team to not score */,
  "avg_no_btts" REAL /* Average odds for either team to not score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, bookmaker, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a match */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON data representing the match details in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_versions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the player */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy of the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player */,
  "tackles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of tackles lost by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_match_statistics" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "possession" REAL /* Possession of the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the team */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the team */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes by the team */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy of the team */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the team */,
  "tackles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of tackles lost by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "match_id")
)
